title: Wu’s new climate plan sets roadmap for cutting emissions by 2030
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Local News Compared to previous iterations, the new plan emphasizes shorter-term implementation and collaboration with outside partners to cut emissions by 50 percent by 2030.

title: Did the MFA’s nude performance push boundaries or go too far?

title: Wellesley mother accused of killing her 2 children due in Vermont court as new details emerge
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime Janette MacAusland is accused of murdering her two young children, whose bodies were found in the family’s Wellesley home Friday night.
By Abby Patkin April 27, 2026 | 11:51 AM 3 minutes to read An undated photo of Ella MacAusland (left) and Kai MacAusland with their mother, Janette MacAusland.

– Photo provided by Cale DarrahJanette MacAusland’s social media footprint paints a rosy, if unremarkable, picture of life in a quiet Wellesley neighborhood, from photos of grinning children to a post on a community Facebook page soliciting cupcake recommendations for an upcoming birthday party.

title: Worcester man allegedly cut off GPS monitor and then robbed a bank in Pennsylvania
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime Police say the man drove to Pennsylvania in a stolen car.
A Worcester man allegedly cut off his GPS ankle monitor before driving a stolen car to Perry County, Pennsylvania, where authorities say he robbed a bank.

title: Boston woman charged with breaking into 2 businesses and a home in Canton
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News Police report the suspect previously threatened violence against the resident of the home she allegedly broke into.

title: Payton Pritchard’s huge night propels Celtics over 76ers in Game 4 blowout: 8 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics “The amount of fans we have, how well they travel, it’s just something I’ve been fortunate enough to experience my entire career,” Jayson Tatum said.
